name: View, Inc.
description: View, Inc. is an American technology company that specializes in the production of smart glass and smart building technologies. Founded in 2007 and headquartered in Milpitas, California, the company manufactures View Dynamic Glass, which intelligently transitions through multiple tint states to control solar energy. By integrating artificial intelligence and cloud-based platforms, View's solutions are designed to improve human health and experience, reduce energy consumption and carbon emissions, and enhance the overall efficiency of modern buildings. The company is a leader in transforming architectural glass to optimize natural light while minimizing heat and glare.
